title: Trump Ally Claims UFO Records Could Reveal Advanced 'Zero Energy' Technology
description: Congressman Tim Burchett claims government agencies are withholding UFO-related information, including potential 'zero energy' technology, sparking renewed debate on transparency and disclosure.
